steps.title: Separate fixed and extra costs
steps.content:
The first $3$ hours cost a fixed $920$ dollars. Since $t>3$, the number of additional hours is:
$$
t-3
$$

steps.title: Build the total cost equation
steps.content: The extra cost is $35$ dollars per additional hour, so the total cost is: $$ 920+35(t-3)=1{,}130 $$ The answer is C.
